generated_oml:
instance MABIMAX100Motor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Motor component in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]
instance MABIMAX100Gearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearbox component in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]
instance SiemensSINUMERIKController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller for MABI MAX 100 robot"
]
instance MABIMAX100RobotSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Serial robot MABI MAX 100 with six axes controlled by Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller",
    base:contains MABIMAX100Motor, MABIMAX100Gearbox, SiemensSINUMERIKController
]
instance RobotSensorDataMQTT : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor, GearboxTemperatureSensor, JointPositionSensor
]
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures current in the motor of the first axis",
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotSensorDataMQTT
]
instance GearboxTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures temperature of the gearbox in the first axis",
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotSensorDataMQTT
]
instance JointPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures position of joints in MABI MAX 100 robot axes",
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotSensorDataMQTT
]
instance JointFrictionIdentification : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous, multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction to enhance robot motion accuracy"
]
instance VisualizationDashboard : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization of robot motion and friction data for decision-making"
]
instance FrictionAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models",
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionIdentification
]
instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing dashboard visualization of robot motion data",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationDashboard
]
instance RFLPMethodology : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RFLP MBSE methodology for multi-level abstraction (requirements, functional, logical, technical layers)",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]
instance OOSEMMBSE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OOSEM MBSE methodology for multi-level abstraction",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]
instance SPESMBSE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SPES MBSE methodology for multi-level abstraction",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]
instance SMArDTMBSE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SMArDT MBSE methodology for multi-level abstraction",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]
instance SysMLADL : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML Architecture Description Language for structural modeling (IBDs, state machines v1.7)",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]
instance ACMEADL : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACME Architecture Description Language for component and interface modeling",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]
instance AADLADL : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AADL Architecture Description Language for real-time systems modeling",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]
instance MontiArcADL : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc ADL for component and interface modeling with MontiArc Automaton",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]
instance SimulinkSimulation : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for analytical simulations of robot motion",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]
instance CppCodeImplementation : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ programming language for code-based implementation of robot control",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]
instance JavaCodeImplementation : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java programming language for code-based implementation of robot control",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]
instance TwinningProcessPipeline : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Four-step twinning process (problem identification, asset analysis, model creation, data identification) enabling dynamic friction model exchange",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]
instance RobotSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated time series sensor data from MABI MAX 100 robot",
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotSensorDataMQTT,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation, SysMLADL, MontiArcADL
]
instance ContextualDataTraces : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Contextual data traces from physical robot systems aggregated and abstracted for specific purposes",
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotSensorDataMQTT,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RFLPMethodology, OOSEMMBSE, SPESMBSE, SMArDTMBSE
]
instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Integrated Block Diagrams for structural modeling of MABI MAX 100 robot",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLADL
]
instance MontiArcBehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton for behavioral modeling of robot",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcADL
]
instance SimulinkSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink model for analytical simulations of robot motion",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system's architecture is defined by a UML-based Digital Shadow Reference Model (Fig. 1) comprising components such as Processing (for data processing and aggregation), Asset (representing the physical entity), and Model (simulation model). Section IV.B details the concrete integration where these components interact through specific relationships to form the digital shadow structure, ensuring coordinated data flow and system-wide orchestration."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for streaming time series sensor data from physical to virtual components."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems utilizes Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for interoperability, MQTT protocol for data streaming, and interfaces with the Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl control system to enable real-time data exchange and system coordination."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems-Engineering (MBSE) uses SysML during development, and Asset Administration Shells (AAS) are referenced for compliance with industry standards."
]
